title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following aspects of raising children today, then decide which two are the most important priorities for parents and society.
options: Encouraging physical activity and outdoor play
Developing digital literacy and responsible technology use
Building strong social and emotional skills
Teaching resilience and independence from an early age

script.text: Now decide which two are the most important priorities for parents and society.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to childhood and parenting. Discuss the following aspects of raising children today, then decide which two are the most important priorities for parents and society. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
